segments.text: I lifted up my eyes, and saw, and behold, a man with a measuring line in his hand.
To measure Jerusalem, to see what is its width and what is its length.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Behold, the angel who talked with me went out, and another angel went out to meet him,
Run, speak to this young man, saying, ‘Jerusalem will be inhabited as villages without walls, because of the multitude of men and livestock in it.
segments.speaker: An Angel of the LORD

segments.text: For I,’ says Yahweh, ‘will be to her a wall of fire around it, and I will be the glory in the middle of her.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Come! Come! Flee from the land of the north,’ says Yahweh; ‘for I have spread you abroad as the four winds of the sky,’ says Yahweh.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: ‘Come, Zion! Escape, you who dwell with the daughter of Babylon.’
segments.speaker: Prophet

segments.text: For Yahweh of Armies says: ‘For honor he has sent me to the nations which plundered you; for he who touches you touches the apple of his eye.
segments.speaker: The LORD of hosts

segments.text: For, behold, I will shake my hand over them, and they will be a plunder to those who served them; and you will know that Yahweh of Armies has sent me.
segments.speaker: The LORD of hosts

segments.text: Sing and rejoice, daughter of Zion! For behold, I come and I will dwell within you,’ says Yahweh.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Many nations shall join themselves to Yahweh in that day, and shall be my people; and I will dwell among you, and you shall know that Yahweh of Armies has sent me to you.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Yahweh will inherit Judah as his portion in the holy land, and will again choose Jerusalem.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Be silent, all flesh, before Yahweh; for he has roused himself from his holy habitation!
segments.speaker: Prophet
